summary: After months of successful bearish trades, he has flipped his outlook to bullish, declaring that the crypto market bottom is in and Bitcoin is poised for higher prices.
narrative: While he spent late 2025 profiting from significant Ethereum shorts, his most recent analysis identifies a market bottom forming, explicitly contradicting bearish 4-Year Cycle theories. He is now watching for catalysts like STRC to provide the marginal buying pressure needed to propel Bitcoin upwards.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
